channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Who are the Japanese? Huge DNA discovery rewrites history
item.description: Scientists analyzing the genomes of thousands of people across Japan discovered evidence for a previously overlooked third ancestral group, challengin...

item.title: Scientists discover the strange way CO2 cools part of Earthâs atmosphere
item.description: Scientists have finally cracked the mystery behind one of climate changeâs strangest fingerprints: while Earthâs surface heats up, the upper atmospher...

item.title: Hidden mathematical pattern found in Chinese money plant leaves
item.description: Researchers discovered a natural geometric pattern in the leaves of the Chinese money plant, revealing a hidden mathematical secret.

item.title: Ancient tree rings reveal deadly solar storm from 800 years ago
item.description: Japanese researchers linked medieval tree rings and historical sky records to uncover a powerful solar storm that occurred centuries ago.
